Bruiser.description: Reduces critical damage received. While at critical health, gain movement speed

Sharpshooter.description: Critical hits reduce your movement ability cooldowns.
Sharpshooter.data: Cooldown reduction based on 0.75% of damage dealt

Specialist.description: Eliminating an enemy briefly increases your reload speed.

Berserker.description: Gain temporary health when dealing critical damage.
Berserker.data: 50% of critical damage dealt (150 max) for 2s

Ignition.description: Hit enemies with fire attacks to burn them.
